subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I call upon Thee at this moment wherein I find myself immersed in the oceans of Thy good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انادیک حینئذ حین الذی اکون متغمسا فی ابحر رضائک و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
